title: acalypha chirindica
intro: Acalypha chirindica, also known as Red Stinging Nettle, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acalypha chirindica include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Acalypha chirindica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications to relieve itching and inflammation.
